learningGoal: Prospective user understands what Prime Self offers and takes the first step to generate their Blueprint.
keyPoints: Prime Self calculates your Free Energy Blueprint using your birth data — date, time, and location
Your Blueprint shows your Energy Type, Strategy, Authority, and the specific Gates that define how you think and work
The AI Synthesis translates your chart into plain language — specific, personal, and immediately useful
Generating your Blueprint takes two minutes, and you access it instantly with no waiting
toneNotes: This is a marketing video. Lead with the outcome and the ease. Confident and decisive. Eric should sound like he has already seen the viewer's blueprint and knows it will matter to them.
